overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia riding a horse through a mountainous wilderness. The journey transitions from a dense coniferous forest trail to open wildflower meadows with snow-capped peaks in the background, ending with a wildlife encounter in a grassy pasture.

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding his horse along a winding dirt path through a dense pine forest with snow-capped mountains visible through the trees ahead

entered.detail: towering snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the distance through the forest canopy
tall evergreen pine trees forming a dense wall along the left side of the trail
thick coniferous trees creating a dark green canopy overhead and along the right side
narrow winding dirt path with patches of grass and gravel
low moss-covered stone wall running parallel to the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dense mountain forest trail with tall coniferous trees creating a partial canopy overhead. Geralt rides along a narrow dirt path bordered by a low stone wall, with majestic snow-capped peaks visible in the far distance through gaps in the foliage.

events.description: forest opens up from dense tree cover to more spaced trees with visible undergrowth and wildflowers

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the forest thins, revealing more sky and colorful wildflowers along the path edges

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulders and rocky outcrops among the trees
clusters of yellow and purple wildflowers growing along the trail edge

segments.scene_description: The trail widens as the dense forest gives way to a more open woodland edge. The stone wall disappears behind as the path curves through areas with rocky outcrops and vibrant wildflowers lining the route, while the snow-capped mountains remain visible ahead.

events.description: herd of deer appears grazing in the meadow to the left of the trail

agents.ego_description: riding through open meadows filled with tall grass and wildflowers, approaching a herd of deer grazing peacefully on the left

notable_agents.action: herd of deer grazing in the tall grass near the trail

entered.detail: isolated pine trees spaced apart in the open meadow
sparse evergreen trees dotting the right side of the meadow
small wooden shed or hunting cabin visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide alpine meadow bathed in sunlight, with the dense forest now behind. The trail continues through tall grass and dense patches of wildflowers, with scattered pine trees dotting the landscape. A small wooden structure appears in the distance on the right, and a herd of deer becomes visible grazing peacefully on the left as the mountains loom closer ahead.

events.description: horse slows from canter to walk and comes to a complete stop in the grass

agents.ego_description: slowing the horse to a stop while observing the deer in the open field near the small wooden structure

notable_agents.action: deer moving away from the path as the horse approaches and stops

entered.detail: prominent rocky outcrop with moss and grass in the open field
expansive grassy area with tall vegetation replacing the defined trail

segments.scene_description: The horse slows to a stop in the open pasture, leaving the defined trail behind. The deer that were grazing nearby begin to move away as Geralt observes the surroundings. The small wooden structure is now closer on the right, and a large rock formation dominates the left foreground, with the snow-capped mountains providing a dramatic backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a sheltered mountain forest trail into a vast, sun-drenched alpine meadow. It begins with Geralt riding along a narrow dirt path bordered by a low stone wall, where tall coniferous trees form a partial canopy that frames distant snow-capped peaks. As the trail widens, the dense forest gives way to an open woodland edge where the stone wall vanishes and vibrant wildflowers begin to line the route among rocky outcrops. The scene then expands into a wide, sunlit meadow of tall grass and scattered pines, revealing a distant wooden structure and a herd of grazing deer. Finally, the horse slows to a stop in the open pasture as the deer retreat, leaving the defined trail behind to face a dramatic backdrop of looming mountains and a large foreground rock formation.
